content:
English interviews are not only about language ability but also about understanding how companies evaluate candidates and how to structure responses effectively.

## What you'll learn
- Understand the logic behind multinational interview evaluation
- Build structured frameworks for answering interview questions
- Practice real interview scenarios with live feedback

## Who it's for
- Job seekers targeting multinational companies
- Professionals preparing for English interviews or career transitions
- Anyone looking to improve interview performance systematically
title: Hack Your Interview
